points.text: Caribou Biosciences — vispa-cel — Relapsed/Refractory Large B-Cell Lymphoma — CRISPR-engineered off-the-shelf CD19-targeted CAR-T therapy demonstrated 82% ORR, 67% CR, and 17.1-month mPFS in pivotal optimized subgroup (N=27) of ANTLER phase 1 trial.
SUIC Worldwide Holdings Ltd. and VisionRenu Biomedical Technology Co., Ltd. signed a Strategic MOU to accelerate AI biotechnology, precision medicine, and U.S. capital market expansion.

Caribou Biosciences — vispa-cel — Second-line Large B-Cell Lymphoma — ANTLER-3 pivotal phase 3 trial designed to address unmet need in patients lacking curative options; data cutoff March 6, 2026 showed 82% ORR and 67% CR in optimized subgroup.

SUIC Worldwide Holdings Ltd. — VisionRenu Biomedical Technology Co., Ltd. — AI Biotechnology & Precision Medicine — Signed Strategic MOU to leverage AI for improving CRISPR gene-editing precision and optimizing DNA/protein design.

Caribou Biosciences — CRISPR genome-editing platform commercialization — vispa-cel (CD19 CAR-T) — Leading clinical-stage CRISPR biopharma; ANTLER phase 1 data supports expansion to community centers; ANTLER-3 phase 3 trial planned.

SUIC Worldwide Holdings Ltd. — AI-driven biotechnology expansion — CRISPR gene-editing precision via AI — Strategic MOU with VisionRenu to integrate AI into Design-Build-Test-Learn (DBTL) platforms for next-generation therapeutics.

VisionRenu Biomedical Technology Co., Ltd. — Global commercialization & capital market access — AI-enhanced CRISPR applications — Partnered with SUIC to accelerate innovation in gene technologies and U.S. market entry.

vispa-cel — Mechanism: CRISPR-engineered allogeneic CD19-targeted CAR-T cell therapy — Phase: 1 (ANTLER) — Population: Second-line relapsed/refractory large B-cell lymphoma (N=27 optimized subgroup) — Comparator: None (single-arm) — Endpoints/Results: 82% ORR, 67% CR, 17.1-month mPFS; no GvHD or ≥Gr 3 ICANS reported.

AI-enabled biotechnology — Mechanism: AI optimization of CRISPR gene-editing precision and DNA/protein design — Application: Accelerating discovery of disease-related genes and shortening development cycles for next-generation therapeutics — Context: Part of Design-Build-Test-Learn (DBTL) platform transformation.

SUIC Worldwide Holdings Ltd. / VisionRenu Biomedical Technology Co., Ltd. — Strategic MOU for AI biotechnology and capital market expansion — Focus on CRISPR precision enhancement and international growth; proposed merger and partnerships with Taiwan's Ministry of Health and Welfare (MOHW) supported AI startups.
